The '''Hall of Peace''' was a large open hall located in the [[new Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was most likely on the first floor as was the [[Morning Court]]. The chamber was used to hold great banquets at the Temple for Jedi, and sometimes politicians.

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the feast of remembrance, held after the [[Funeral of Mara Jade Skywalker|funeral]] of [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], took place there. It was located in one of the four newly constructed pyramids around the Jedi Temple.
